box paid for itself in month 8. every dollar after is 99% margin

Bookmark it asap and use before all noticed

cloud isn't cheaper. it's someone else's profit margin disguised as convenience

items.title: 🚨 do you understand what is about to happen to the stock market..
items.summary:
🚨 do you understand what is about to happen to the stock market..

Three of the most valuable private companies on earth - SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic - are all racing to go public in the same year. 

Together they could dump close to $3 trillion of market value onto public investors in a matter of months.

- Anthropic, the company behind Claude, went from $9B to $30B+ annualized revenue in 15 months - roughly 1,400% growth
- It's now valued around $965B, passing OpenAI for the first time ever
- 2026's IPO lineup is unreal: SpaceX (up to $75B raise, biggest in history), OpenAI targeting fall, and Anthropic eyeing October
- Big funds are already hoarding cash and may sell Alphabet and other megacaps just to make room

The AI gold rush is no longer private. The shovel sellers are about to ring the bell.

items.title: 🚨 the richest man on the planet just lost a $134 billion lawsuit in under two hours..
items.summary:
🚨 the richest man on the planet just lost a $134 billion lawsuit in under two hours..

Elon Musk sued OpenAI, Sam Altman, and Microsoft.. claimed they stole a nonprofit he helped build and turned it into a money machine.. wanted Altman fired, the company dismantled, and $134 billion returned

the jury didn't even get to whether OpenAI did anything wrong.. they said Musk filed too late.. statute of limitations.. three years to sue and he missed the window

think about that.. a man who runs X, advises the president, launches rockets, and builds AI at xAI.. couldn't beat a filing deadline

in 2015 Musk put $38 million into OpenAI.. in 2018 he walked away.. in 2023 he built xAI to compete with them.. in 2024 he sued.. in 2026 a jury said you should've spoken up sooner

two billionaires went to war over who gets to control the technology that might replace the rest of us.. and it ended not with a verdict on right or wrong.. but on a calendar

Tôi là một trợ lý nghiên cứu thông minh, được thiết kế để hỗ trợ bạn xử lý công việc một cách nhanh chóng và chủ động.

Tôi có khả năng thực hiện các tác vụ sau mà không cần bạn phải hướng dẫn chi tiết từng bước:

*   **Tìm kiếm thông tin:** Tra cứu dữ liệu trên internet, mạng xã hội hoặc các bài báo khoa học.
*   **Xử lý nội dung:** Đọc và tóm tắt nội dung từ các đường dẫn (URL), tài liệu hoặc bài viết.
*   **Hỗ trợ công việc:** Tìm kiếm việc làm, soạn thảo và gửi văn bản, hoặc đăng tải thông tin.
*   **Tra cứu nội bộ:** Tìm kiếm thông tin trong các tài liệu chính sách hoặc hướng dẫn cụ thể.

Tôi ưu tiên sự hiệu quả: nếu có thông tin chưa rõ ràng, tôi sẽ tự đưa ra phán đoán hợp lý và thực hiện ngay thay vì làm phiền bạn bằng các câu hỏi. Bạn chỉ cần đưa ra yêu cầu, tôi sẽ hoàn thành nó trong một bước duy nhất.

السيناتور بيرني ساندرز يقترح قانون يمنح الامريكيين نصف ملكية شركات الذكاء الاصطناعي!

أعلن السناتور Bernie Sanders عن تقديم مشروع قانون "الصندوق السيادي الأمريكي للذكاء الاصطناعي" (American AI Sovereign Wealth Fund Act) في الأسابيع المقبلة. 

يقترح المشروع نقل 50% من حصص الملكية (equity) مرة واحدة من كبرى شركات الذكاء الاصطناعي مثل @OpenAI و @Anthropic وxAI إلى صندوق عام تديره الحكومة الفيدرالية. 

الهدف: ضمان أن تذهب تريليونات الدولارات المتوقعة من قيمة الذكاء الاصطناعي إلى جميع الأمريكيين، لا إلى حفنة من الأثرياء فقط، مع منح الجمهور ممثلين في مجالس الإدارة للتأثير على القرارات الاستراتيجية. 

يستند ساندرز إلى فكرة أن الذكاء الاصطناعي مبني على المعرفة الجماعية والبيانات العامة للشعب الأمريكي، لذا يجب أن يعود جزء كبير من ثماره إلى المجتمع. 

القانون يمثل نقاش مهم حول توزيع ثروة الـAI، لكنه سيظل غالباً أداة سياسية/إعلامية لساندرز. قد يؤدي إلى نقاشات أوسع أو اقتراحات أضعف (مثل ضرائب أعلى على الأرباح أو صناديق أصغر)، لكن النسخة الحالية (50% equity) بعيدة جداً عن الواقع التشريعي.

items.summary: # Exclusive: OpenAI launches biodefense program. OpenAI is launching a tool to help develop new biodefense and pandemic preparedness capabilities, according to an announcement shared first with Axios. **Driving the news:** OpenAI's new Rosalind Biodefense Program will offer its GPT-Rosalind model for life sciences research to "trusted developers" operationalizing biodefense tools. * The company will sponsor access to the tool and provide launch support for epidemiological modeling, early detection, screening, preparedness, non-pharmaceutical interventions and other public-health work. * OpenAI is supporting organizations that it says span the life cycle of biological threats "from prevention and early detection to societal resilience and medical countermeasure development.". **What's next:** OpenAI said it briefed the White House and several federal agencies on its approach, and is in the process of involving public-health-focused federal agencies. * The company is also expanding access to GPT-Rosalind for select U.S. government and allied partners to support public health and biodefense missions.

items.title: Florida sues OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, accusing them of putting profit over safety - NBC News
items.summary: # Florida sues OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, accusing them of putting profit over safety. Florida seeks to hold Sam Altman personally liable, accusing OpenAI of marketing ChatGPT as safe while concealing that it could drive users toward harm. Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier sued OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman on Monday, accusing the company of putting profit over safety, fueling violence and pushing a product it knew could harm users. “The rise of OpenAI is attributable to a web of deceit and the exploitation of users (including Floridians), leveraging their data and safety to boost OpenAI’s market value at unacceptable costs,” the complaint reviewed by NBC News and filed Monday said. Florida is the first state to sue OpenAI and Altman over design and safety. “Last year’s mass shooting at Florida State University was a tragedy, but ChatGPT is not responsible for this terrible crime,” OpenAI spokesman Drew Pusateri said in a statement to NBC News after the company was sued by the family of a victim of the shooting.

items.title: Флорида штати OpenAI ва Sam Altman устидан судга шикоят киритди - Zamin.uz
items.summary: # Florida files lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman. The Florida Attorney General's Office has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and its CEO Sam Altman. This is the first state-level legal action regarding the involvement of the ChatGPT chatbot in cases of violence. The lawsuit accuses the company of neglecting safety measures in order to win the "AI race" and generate massive wealth. As part of a criminal investigation launched in April, the role of ChatGPT in a mass shooting that occurred last year at Florida State University (FSU) is being examined. OpenAI representatives deny responsibility for this tragedy, maintaining that ChatGPT is not the cause of the crime. This is not the only legal challenge for OpenAI. Additionally, a lawsuit recently filed by Elon Musk has concluded, in which the entrepreneur accused the company of abandoning its mission to benefit humanity and becoming a commercial organization. items.summary: # Exclusive: OpenAI readies cyber, misinformation defenses ahead of elections. OpenAI is announcing new partnerships to combat misinformation, offering its cybersecurity products to state officials and backing legislation ahead of elections in the U.S. and globally. **Why it matters:** AI is becoming an election mainstay, with candidates, especially Republicans, using it for their campaigns as voters turn to chatbots for information. **Driving the news:** OpenAI is seeking to meet the moment with a series of new efforts shared first with Axios on Wednesday. * The company is offering its cybersecurity products — Codex Security and its Trusted Access for Cyber program — to registered voting system manufacturers in the U.S. * It's briefing the National Association of Secretaries of State and the National Association of State Election Directors on the latest cyber capabilities. * OpenAI made similar efforts ahead of the 2024 election, during which AI companies faced widespread criticism for inaccurate and misleading information being generated by chatbots.
